title: Christmas Bruschetta
ingredients: 1 can small artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
¼ cup freshly grated parmesan cheese and more for topping
instructions: In small bowl, blend butter and garlic. Spread garlic butter on baguette slices and toast under broiler. Mix remaining ingredients together in a separate bowl. Spoon artichoke/feta mixture on baguette slices. Sprinkle with additional parmesan cheese. Broil until bubbly and lightly browned.
